svg.title: ARIA reference architecture infographic with distribution gateway
svg.desc: One-page leadership brief for the ARIA framework showing the four-layer architecture, five entity types, lifecycle states, GitHub marketplace, Microsoft Purview integration, distribution gateway, end-user consumption channels, and enterprise capability model.
svg.text: ARIA: Governing the AI asset estate
OASF classification · GitHub marketplace · Purview governance · distribution gateway
Five entity types classified by OASF
Agent → invokes → Skill · Agent → governed_by → Instruction · Agent → grounded_in → Knowledge · Orchestration → composed_by → Agent

g.text: Build OCI artifact → push to ACR → tag CID
Purview label → Data Map lineage → DLP eval

svg.text: OCI is the governance layer — the gateway is the user-facing layer

g.text: Extensions panel shows org's ARIA catalog. Click "add to Claude."
OASF domains match user's task. Blocked assets never surface.

svg.text: Agent inherits the highest classification of any dependency

g.text: The governed path must be the easiest path
For developers: governance in the PR · For end users: one-click install in Claude Desktop · Compliance as code

svg.text: Josh Garverick · Chief Technical Architect, Xebia · April 2026
